expectations.text: signup form 상태를 담당하는 훅이 hooks/utils/signup 경로에 생성된다
expectations.evidence: Hook at hooks/utils/signup/useSignupForm/index.ts — domain=signup matches app/signup/page.tsx

expectations.text: signup submit을 담당하는 훅이 hooks/apis/auth/mutations/usePostSignup 경로에 생성된다
expectations.evidence: No separate API mutation hook created; submit logic (signup call, router.push, generalError state) remains inline in page.tsx

expectations.text: 비 API 훅이 hooks/utils/{domain}/{hookName}/index.ts 패턴으로 생성된다
page에서 직접적인 fetch/business logic이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: Page uses signup from useAuth context (not direct fetch); orchestration logic remains but no raw API calls
validate() checks state.password !== state.confirmPassword; handleConfirmPasswordBlur also validates
